reporting_to: Camille Durand, Director of Data Engineering
work_location: Hybrid — 3 days on-site at 820 Kendall Square, Cambridge, MA 02139
signing_bonus: $12,000, payable within 30 days of start date, subject to 12-month clawback if voluntary departure
equity_details: Stock option grant of 8,500 shares of Fenwick Biotech Ltd. common stock, vesting over 4 years with a 1-year cliff, subject to Board approval and the terms of the 2024 Equity Incentive Plan.
bonus_details: Eligible for an annual performance bonus of up to 15% of base salary, based on individual performance metrics and company revenue targets. First-year bonus prorated from start date.
benefits_summary: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance through Aetna (employee contribution: 10%). Life insurance at 2x annual salary. 401(k) with 4% company match, vesting immediately. Commuter benefits up to $300/month. Annual professional development budget of $3,500.
pto_details: 20 days paid vacation, 10 paid holidays, 5 personal days, and 12 weeks paid parental leave. Unused vacation rolls over up to 5 days per year.
conditions:
This offer is contingent upon:
1. Satisfactory completion of a background verification through Sterling Check
2. Verification of eligibility to work in the United States
3. Execution of the Proprietary Information and Inventions Assignment Agreement
4. Successful completion of a standard reference check
at_will_statement: Employment with Fenwick Biotech Ltd. is at-will. Either you or the company may terminate the employment relationship at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. This letter does not constitute a contract of employment for any specific period.
agreements: As a condition of employment, you will be required to sign the Fenwick Biotech Proprietary Information and Inventions Assignment Agreement and the Non-Solicitation Agreement, copies of which are enclosed with this letter.
